mapper.sql: id , project_name, project_code,project_status, project_type,create_time, update_time, create_user_id, owner_user_id, create_user_name, owner_user_name, gene_edit_method, expect_start_date,task_num,project_category_code
mapper.select:
select
from cer_project_tb order by id desc

select
from cer_project_tb order by id desc
select distinct owner_user_id, owner_user_name from cer_project_tb where owner_user_id is not null
select count(*) as num from cer_project_tb
